sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الْمُدِيرُ مِنَ الْفَرِيقِ حُضُورَ اجْتِمَاعٍ قَصِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je od tima tražio prisustvo na kratkom sastanku.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked the team to attend a short meeting.

sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ الْجَمِيعُ فِي قَاعَةِ الِاجْتِمَاعَاتِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّالِثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su se okupili u sali za sastanke u tri sata.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone gathered in the meeting room at three o'clock.

sentences.arabic: تَكَلَّمَ الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ مَهَامِّ الْأُسْبُوعِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je govorio o zadacima za sljedeću sedmicu.
sentences.translationEn: The manager talked about the tasks for the coming week.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ كُلُّ مُوَظَّفٍ سُؤَالًا وَاحِدًا وَانْتَهَى الِاجْتِمَاعُ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki zaposleni je postavio jedno pitanje i sastanak je brzo završio.
sentences.translationEn: Every employee asked one question and the meeting ended quickly.
